# 自动推进国策（japan_wtt_focus），每日由 on_daily 调用（仿原版德国核心圈机制）：
# 高亮 shine = 正在自动推进的国策；正计时 autocore_focus_days 每日加 1，
#   计满 autocore_focus_total（= 国策 cost x 7 天）用 complete_national_focus 完成——耗时与手动一致。
# 暂停：玩家有任意国策在推进（focus_progress > 0 且未完成）-> 计时冻结、保留高亮，
#   玩家国策做完/取消后自动续跑。进度显示在国策详情 tooltip（已推进 days / total 天）。
# 失效清理：已亮但条件从满足变为不满足（政体/战争状态变化等）-> 熄灭并中止计时，重选目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。

				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_form_the_kido_butai
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_sea_heavier_naval_guns }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = JAP_balanced_naval_approach has_completed_focus = JAP_sea_battleship_initiative }
					custom_trigger_tooltip = { tooltip = JAP_expand_hiratsuka_navy_arsenal_tt NOT = { has_idea = MTG_naval_treaty_adherent } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_sea_heavier_naval_guns
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_sea_heavier_naval_guns
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_naval_armaments_program }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = JAP_form_the_kido_butai has_completed_focus = JAP_sea_heavier_naval_guns }
					JAP_naval_faction_is_at_least_influential = yes OR = { AND = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier has_completed_focus = JAP_focus_on_aircraft_carriers } AND = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier is_special_project_completed = sp:sp_naval_super_heavy_battleship has_completed_focus = JAP_balanced_naval_approach } AND = { is_special_project_completed = sp:sp_naval_super_heavy_battleship has_completed_focus = JAP_sea_battleship_initiative } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_naval_armaments_program
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_naval_armaments_program
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_radio_guided_missiles }
					has_completed_focus = JAP_naval_armaments_program
					has_completed_focus = JAP_rockets_development
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_radio_guided_missiles
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_radio_guided_missiles
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_nationalize_suzuka_naval_arsenal }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = JAP_form_the_kido_butai has_completed_focus = JAP_sea_heavier_naval_guns }
					JAP_naval_faction_is_at_least_influential = yes
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_nationalize_suzuka_naval_arsenal
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_nationalize_suzuka_naval_arsenal
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_nationalize_fujinagata_shipyards }
					has_completed_focus = JAP_nationalize_suzuka_naval_arsenal
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_nationalize_fujinagata_shipyards
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_nationalize_fujinagata_shipyards
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_secure_the_sea_lanes }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = JAP_naval_armaments_program has_completed_focus = JAP_assure_superior_naval_quality has_completed_focus = JAP_seek_strength_in_numbers has_completed_focus = JAP_nationalize_suzuka_naval_arsenal }
					has_war_with_major = yes
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_secure_the_sea_lanes
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_secure_the_sea_lanes
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_fix_flawed_naval_designs }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = JAP_naval_armaments_program has_completed_focus = JAP_assure_superior_naval_quality has_completed_focus = JAP_seek_strength_in_numbers has_completed_focus = JAP_nationalize_suzuka_naval_arsenal }
					has_war_with_major = yes
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_fix_flawed_naval_designs
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_fix_flawed_naval_designs
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_f_go_nuclear_project }
					has_completed_focus = JAP_fix_flawed_naval_designs
					has_completed_focus = JAP_secure_the_sea_lanes
					has_war_with_major = yes JAP_naval_faction_is_at_least_influential = yes
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_f_go_nuclear_project
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_f_go_nuclear_project
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_combined_nuclear_research_efforts }
					has_completed_focus = JAP_f_go_nuclear_project
					has_completed_focus = JAP_ni_go_nuclear_project
					JAP_naval_faction_is_same_as_army = yes
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_combined_nuclear_research_efforts
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_combined_nuclear_research_efforts
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = JAP_end_the_interservice_rivalry }
					has_completed_focus = JAP_combined_nuclear_research_efforts
					JAP_naval_faction_is_same_as_army = yes
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = JAP_end_the_interservice_rivalry
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_JAP_end_the_interservice_rivalry
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
		}
	}
}

# 自动推进国策（german_focus），每日由 on_daily 调用（仿原版德国核心圈机制）：
# 高亮 shine = 正在自动推进的国策；正计时 autocore_focus_days 每日加 1，
#   计满 autocore_focus_total（= 国策 cost x 7 天）用 complete_national_focus 完成——耗时与手动一致。
# 暂停：玩家有任意国策在推进（focus_progress > 0 且未完成）-> 计时冻结、保留高亮，
#   玩家国策做完/取消后自动续跑。进度显示在国策详情 tooltip（已推进 days / total 天）。
# 失效清理：已亮但条件从满足变为不满足（政体/战争状态变化等）-> 熄灭并中止计时，重选目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_ger_shine = {
	# ---- 暂停：玩家国策进行中 -> 冻结倒计时，保留高亮 ----
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = GER_prioritize_economic_growth progress > 0 }

				}

				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_scandinavian_membership
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_baltic_membership }
					has_completed_focus = GER_scandinavian_membership
					is_subject = no is_faction_leader = yes NOT = { has_war_with = EST } NOT = { has_war_with = LAT } NOT = { has_war_with = LIT } SOV = { OR = { NOT = { has_war_with = EST } NOT = { has_war_with = LAT } NOT = { has_war_with = LIT } } }
					NOT = { EST = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_in_faction_with = SOV exists = no has_war_with = SOV is_subject = yes } } LAT = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_in_faction_with = SOV exists = no has_war_with = SOV is_subject = yes } } LIT = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT is_in_faction_with = SOV exists = no has_war_with = SOV is_subject = yes } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = GER_baltic_membership
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_baltic_membership
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_polish_membership }
					has_completed_focus = GER_scandinavian_membership
					is_subject = no is_faction_leader = yes NOT = { has_war_with = POL } SOV = { NOT = { has_war_with = POL } }
					NOT = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = POL NOT = { country_exists = POL } POL = { is_subject = yes } SOV = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = POL has_war_with = POL } } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = GER_polish_membership
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_polish_membership
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_finnish_membership }
					has_completed_focus = GER_scandinavian_membership
					is_subject = no is_faction_leader = yes NOT = { has_war_with = FIN } SOV = { NOT = { has_war_with = FIN } }
					NOT = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = FIN NOT = { country_exists = FIN } is_subject = yes SOV = { OR = { is_in_faction_with = FIN has_war_with = FIN } } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = GER_finnish_membership
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_finnish_membership
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_strike_at_the_source }
					has_completed_focus = GER_baltic_membership
					has_completed_focus = GER_polish_membership
					has_completed_focus = GER_finnish_membership
					is_subject = no SOV = { has_government = communism } NOT = { is_in_faction_with = SOV }
					NOT = { OR = { has_war_with = SOV NOT = { country_exists = SOV } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = GER_strike_at_the_source
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_strike_at_the_source
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_reverse_the_brain_drain }
					has_completed_focus = GER_the_monarchy_compromise
					is_subject = no
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = GER_reverse_the_brain_drain
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_reverse_the_brain_drain
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_shared_rd_programs }
					has_completed_focus = GER_reverse_the_brain_drain
					has_completed_focus = GER_central_european_alliance
					is_subject = no
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = GER_shared_rd_programs
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_shared_rd_programs
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_the_mannheim_project }
					has_completed_focus = GER_shared_rd_programs
					has_completed_focus = GER_scandinavian_membership
					is_subject = no is_in_faction_with = NOR
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = GER_the_mannheim_project
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_the_mannheim_project
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = GER_pool_technical_know_how }
					has_completed_focus = GER_shared_rd_programs
					is_subject = no
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = GER_pool_technical_know_how
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_GER_pool_technical_know_how
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
		}
	}
}

# 自动推进国策（french_focus），每日由 on_daily 调用（仿原版德国核心圈机制）：
# 高亮 shine = 正在自动推进的国策；正计时 autocore_focus_days 每日加 1，
#   计满 autocore_focus_total（= 国策 cost x 7 天）用 complete_national_focus 完成——耗时与手动一致。
# 暂停：玩家有任意国策在推进（focus_progress > 0 且未完成）-> 计时冻结、保留高亮，
#   玩家国策做完/取消后自动续跑。进度显示在国策详情 tooltip（已推进 days / total 天）。
# 失效清理：已亮但条件从满足变为不满足（政体/战争状态变化等）-> 熄灭并中止计时，重选目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。

# 自动推进国策（italian_focus），每日由 on_daily 调用（仿原版德国核心圈机制）：
# 高亮 shine = 正在自动推进的国策；正计时 autocore_focus_days 每日加 1，
#   计满 autocore_focus_total（= 国策 cost x 7 天）用 complete_national_focus 完成——耗时与手动一致。
# 暂停：玩家有任意国策在推进（focus_progress > 0 且未完成）-> 计时冻结、保留高亮，
#   玩家国策做完/取消后自动续跑。进度显示在国策详情 tooltip（已推进 days / total 天）。
# 失效清理：已亮但条件从满足变为不满足（政体/战争状态变化等）-> 熄灭并中止计时，重选目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_ita_shine = {
	# ---- 暂停：玩家国策进行中 -> 冻结倒计时，保留高亮 ----
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_ethiopian_war_logistics_bba progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_ethiopian_war_logistics_bba }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_italian_highways_bba progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_italian_highways_bba }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_ministry_of_italian_africa progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_ministry_of_italian_africa }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_develop_ethiopia progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_ethiopia }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_develop_libya progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_libya }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_develop_eritrea progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_eritrea }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_develop_somaliland progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_develop_somaliland }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_regional_development progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_regional_development }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = ITA_litoranea_balbo progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_litoranea_balbo }

					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_military_agreements }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_reestablish_old_alliances
					is_in_faction = yes any_allied_country = { is_major = yes }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_military_agreements
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_military_agreements
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_the_enemies_of_capitalism }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_military_agreements
					any_country = { original_tag = SOV exists = yes NOT = { is_in_faction_with = ROOT } NOT = { has_non_aggression_pact_with = ROOT } NOT = { is_guaranteed_by = ROOT } has_government = communism }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_the_enemies_of_capitalism
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_the_enemies_of_capitalism
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_the_ethiopian_question }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_defy_the_duce
					has_civil_war = no is_subject = no
					NOT = { ETH = { OR = { exists = no is_subject = yes is_in_faction = yes has_capitulated = yes } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_the_ethiopian_question
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_the_ethiopian_question
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_cooperatives_for_intensive_exploitation }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_abolish_the_colonies
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_cooperatives_for_intensive_exploitation
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_cooperatives_for_intensive_exploitation
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_condemn_colonialism }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_cooperatives_for_intensive_exploitation
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_condemn_colonialism
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_condemn_colonialism
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_negotiations_with_albania }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = ITA_abolish_the_colonies has_completed_focus = ITA_new_colonial_policies }
					OR = { has_government = communism has_government = neutrality }
					NOT = { NOT = { country_exists = ALB } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_negotiations_with_albania
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_negotiations_with_albania
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_enlist_the_bashkimi_kombetar }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_negotiations_with_albania
					44 = { controller = { OR = { tag = ROOT is_subject_of = ROOT } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_enlist_the_bashkimi_kombetar
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_enlist_the_bashkimi_kombetar
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_the_italian_confederation }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_new_colonial_policies
					OR = { is_faction_leader = yes is_in_faction = no }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_the_italian_confederation
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_the_italian_confederation
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_planned_economy }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_the_italian_confederation
					num_subjects > 4 has_idea = ITA_italian_confederation_leader
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_planned_economy
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_planned_economy
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_the_fight_overseas }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = ITA_cooperatives_for_intensive_exploitation has_completed_focus = ITA_the_italian_confederation }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_the_fight_overseas
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_the_fight_overseas
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_irregulars }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_the_fight_overseas
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_irregulars
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_irregulars
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_liberate_the_workers_of_africa }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_the_fight_overseas
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_liberate_the_workers_of_africa
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_liberate_the_workers_of_africa
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ITA_ascari }
					has_completed_focus = ITA_the_fight_overseas
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ITA_ascari
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ITA_ascari
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
		}
	}
}

# 自动推进国策（british_focus），每日由 on_daily 调用（仿原版德国核心圈机制）：
# 高亮 shine = 正在自动推进的国策；正计时 autocore_focus_days 每日加 1，
#   计满 autocore_focus_total（= 国策 cost x 7 天）用 complete_national_focus 完成——耗时与手动一致。
# 暂停：玩家有任意国策在推进（focus_progress > 0 且未完成）-> 计时冻结、保留高亮，
#   玩家国策做完/取消后自动续跑。进度显示在国策详情 tooltip（已推进 days / total 天）。
# 失效清理：已亮但条件从满足变为不满足（政体/战争状态变化等）-> 熄灭并中止计时，重选目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。

					has_completed_focus = ENG_god_save_the_king

					NOT = { owns_state = 113 owns_state = 134 owns_state = 135 owns_state = 119 owns_state = 122 owns_state = 133 owns_state = 121 owns_state = 136 owns_state = 120 }

				}

				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ENG_appeal_to_imperial_loyalists
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}

				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ENG_bring_the_dominions_back_into_the_fold }
					has_completed_focus = ENG_appeal_to_imperial_loyalists
					is_subject = no
					NOT = { OR = { AND = { NOT = { country_exists = CAN } NOT = { country_exists = SAF } NOT = { country_exists = AST } NOT = { country_exists = NZL } } AND = { is_in_faction_with = CAN CAN = { OR = { has_country_flag = ENG_dominions_stayed_with_fascist_britain_flag has_country_flag = britain_enforced_our_loyalty } } is_in_faction_with = SAF SAF = { OR = { has_country_flag = ENG_dominions_stayed_with_fascist_britain_flag has_country_flag = britain_enforced_our_loyalty } } is_in_faction_with = AST AST = { OR = { has_country_flag = ENG_dominions_stayed_with_fascist_britain_flag has_country_flag = britain_enforced_our_loyalty } } is_in_faction_with = NZL NZL = { OR = { has_country_flag = ENG_dominions_stayed_with_fascist_britain_flag has_country_flag = britain_enforced_our_loyalty } } } has_completed_focus = ENG_towards_dominion_independence } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = ENG_bring_the_dominions_back_into_the_fold
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ENG_bring_the_dominions_back_into_the_fold

					is_subject = no has_war = no OR = { has_government = fascism has_government = communism } OR = { RAJ = { is_subject_of = ENG } CAN = { is_subject_of = ENG } SAF = { is_subject_of = ENG } AST = { is_subject_of = ENG } NZL = { is_subject_of = ENG } }

				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = ENG_spirit_of_the_industrial_revolution }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = ENG_soviet_cooperation has_completed_focus = ENG_liberate_the_home_of_marx has_completed_focus = ENG_crush_the_dream }

				activate_shine_on_focus = ENG_spirit_of_the_industrial_revolution
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_ENG_spirit_of_the_industrial_revolution
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
		}
	}
}

# 自动推进国策（usa_focus），每日由 on_daily 调用（仿原版德国核心圈机制）：
# 高亮 shine = 正在自动推进的国策；正计时 autocore_focus_days 每日加 1，
#   计满 autocore_focus_total（= 国策 cost x 7 天）用 complete_national_focus 完成——耗时与手动一致。
# 暂停：玩家有任意国策在推进（focus_progress > 0 且未完成）-> 计时冻结、保留高亮，
#   玩家国策做完/取消后自动续跑。进度显示在国策详情 tooltip（已推进 days / total 天）。
# 失效清理：已亮但条件从满足变为不满足（政体/战争状态变化等）-> 熄灭并中止计时，重选目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_usa_shine = {
	# ---- 暂停：玩家国策进行中 -> 冻结倒计时，保留高亮 ----
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = USA_continue_the_new_deal progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_continue_the_new_deal }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = USA_suspend_the_presecution }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = USA_desegregate_the_armed_forces progress > 0 }

				}

					focus_progress = { focus = USA_full_desegregation progress > 0 }

				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = USA_democratic_socialism progress > 0 }

# 自动推进国策（china_nationalist_sea_focus），每日由 on_daily 调用（仿原版德国核心圈机制）：
# 高亮 shine = 正在自动推进的国策；正计时 autocore_focus_days 每日加 1，
#   计满 autocore_focus_total（= 国策 cost x 7 天）用 complete_national_focus 完成——耗时与手动一致。
# 暂停：玩家有任意国策在推进（focus_progress > 0 且未完成）-> 计时冻结、保留高亮，
#   玩家国策做完/取消后自动续跑。进度显示在国策详情 tooltip（已推进 days / total 天）。
# 失效清理：已亮但条件从满足变为不满足（政体/战争状态变化等）-> 熄灭并中止计时，重选目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。
auto_focus_complete_chi_sea_shine = {
	# ---- 暂停：玩家国策进行中 -> 冻结倒计时，保留高亮 ----
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = CHI_end_military_primacy progress > 0 }
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = CHI_end_military_primacy }
				}
				AND = {
					focus_progress = { focus = CHI_accelerate_the_tutelage progress > 0 }

		# 中止条件：shine 丢失（被事件等外部完成）或 条件不再满足 -> 熄灭、清标记、归零计时
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = autocore_wip_CHI_accelerate_the_tutelage

			clr_country_flag = autocore_wip_CHI_revive_the_chinese_action_committee

					}
				}

				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = CHI_central_steel_and_machine_works
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_CHI_central_steel_and_machine_works
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = CHI_empower_those_that_have_lost }
					has_completed_focus = CHI_expand_the_cooperatives
					has_completed_focus = CHI_administer_cooperatives
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = CHI_empower_those_that_have_lost
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_CHI_empower_those_that_have_lost
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = CHI_construct_the_banqiao_dam }
					has_completed_focus = CHI_monopolise_resource_extraction
					controls_state = 607 607 = { dam < 1 }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = CHI_construct_the_banqiao_dam
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_CHI_construct_the_banqiao_dam
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = CHI_expand_national_sun_yat_sen_university }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = CHI_found_a_modern_fertiliser_plant has_completed_focus = CHI_import_fertilisers }
					has_completed_focus = CHI_central_steel_and_machine_works
					has_completed_focus = CHI_tungsten_and_antimony_extraction
					num_of_factories > 74
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = CHI_expand_national_sun_yat_sen_university
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_CHI_expand_national_sun_yat_sen_university
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
		}
	}
}

# 自动推进国策（china_communist_focus_sea），每日由 on_daily 调用（仿原版德国核心圈机制）：
# 高亮 shine = 正在自动推进的国策；正计时 autocore_focus_days 每日加 1，
#   计满 autocore_focus_total（= 国策 cost x 7 天）用 complete_national_focus 完成——耗时与手动一致。
# 暂停：玩家有任意国策在推进（focus_progress > 0 且未完成）-> 计时冻结、保留高亮，
#   玩家国策做完/取消后自动续跑。进度显示在国策详情 tooltip（已推进 days / total 天）。
# 失效清理：已亮但条件从满足变为不满足（政体/战争状态变化等）-> 熄灭并中止计时，重选目标。
# 可选=前置满足/未被互斥锁/available与allow_branch成立/未被bypass；完成时引擎自动清 shine。
# 带 mutually_exclusive 的国策一律跳过：路线选择留给玩家手动，选定后其后续继续自动。
# 由 national_focus 源文件自动生成，勿手改。

				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_establish_pla_air_force
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_pilot_training }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_establish_pla_air_force
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_pilot_training
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_pilot_training
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_appoint_chang_qiankun }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_pilot_training
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_appoint_chang_qiankun
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_appoint_chang_qiankun
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_the_northeast_aviation_university_sea }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_appoint_chang_qiankun
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_the_northeast_aviation_university_sea
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_the_northeast_aviation_university_sea
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_form_the_5th_research_institute }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_the_northeast_aviation_university_sea
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_form_the_5th_research_institute
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_form_the_5th_research_institute
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_aviation_infrastructure }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_pilot_training
					if = { limit = { has_dlc = "By Blood Alone" } OR = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane has_tech = iw_small_airframe has_tech = iw_medium_airframe has_tech = iw_large_airframe } } else = { OR = { has_tech = early_fighter has_tech = early_bomber has_tech = early_transport_plane } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_aviation_infrastructure
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_aviation_infrastructure
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_anti_air_effort }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_aviation_infrastructure
					has_tech = interwar_antiair
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_anti_air_effort
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_anti_air_effort
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_strengthen_the_air_arsenal }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_anti_air_effort
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_strengthen_the_air_arsenal
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_strengthen_the_air_arsenal
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_establish_domestic_aircraft_production }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_aviation_infrastructure
					has_completed_focus = PRC_appoint_chang_qiankun
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_establish_domestic_aircraft_production
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_establish_domestic_aircraft_production
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_air_force_capstone }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_large_plane_focus has_completed_focus = PRC_light_plane_focus has_completed_focus = PRC_medium_plane_focus }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_air_force_capstone
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_air_force_capstone
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_establish_pla_navy }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_prepare_for_third_phase
					any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_establish_pla_navy
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_establish_pla_navy
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_dockyard_construction_efforts }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_establish_pla_navy
					any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_dockyard_construction_efforts
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_dockyard_construction_efforts
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_mio }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_establish_pla_navy
					any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_naval_mio
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_naval_mio
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_destroyers }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_mio has_completed_focus = PRC_dockyard_construction_efforts }
					any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT } has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light SOV = { exists = yes is_subject = no has_government = communism }
					NOT = { SOV = { OR = { exists = no is_subject = yes NOT = { has_government = communism } } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_destroyers
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_destroyers
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_submarines }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_destroyers
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_submarines
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_submarines
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_the_pla_naval_school }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_dockyard_construction_efforts
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_the_pla_naval_school
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_the_pla_naval_school
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_reappoint_jinguang_as_admiral }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_the_pla_naval_school
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_reappoint_jinguang_as_admiral
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_reappoint_jinguang_as_admiral
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_mio
					any_core_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_cruisers }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort has_completed_focus = PRC_the_pla_naval_school }
					any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT } has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser SOV = { exists = yes is_subject = no has_government = communism }
					NOT = { SOV = { OR = { exists = no is_subject = yes NOT = { has_government = communism } } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_cruisers
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_cruisers
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_capital_ships }
					OR = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort has_completed_focus = PRC_the_pla_naval_school }
					any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT } has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy SOV = { exists = yes is_subject = no has_government = communism }
					NOT = { SOV = { OR = { exists = no is_subject = yes NOT = { has_government = communism } } } }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_capital_ships
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_capital_ships
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_carriers }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_capital_ships
					has_completed_focus = PRC_cruisers
					any_owned_state = { is_coastal = yes is_controlled_by = ROOT }
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_carriers
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_carriers
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_guns }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_infrastructure_effort
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_naval_guns
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_naval_guns
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 35 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_ocean_navy }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_reappoint_jinguang_as_admiral
					has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_guns
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_naval_ocean_navy
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_naval_ocean_navy
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_capstone }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_ocean_navy
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_naval_capstone
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_naval_capstone
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_completed_focus = PRC_central_military_commision }
					has_completed_focus = PRC_naval_capstone
					has_completed_focus = PRC_air_force_capstone
					has_completed_focus = PRC_a_modern_army
				}
				activate_shine_on_focus = PRC_central_military_commision
				set_country_flag = autocore_wip_PRC_central_military_commision
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_days = 0 }
				set_variable = { autocore_focus_total = 70 }
			}
		}
	}
}

# ============ 总入口 ============
# auto_focus_shine：每日调用，驱动自动国策全流程（仿原版德国核心圈）：
#   点亮目标 -> 按国策真实时长（cost x 7 天）倒计时 -> 到点完成；
#   玩家手动国策进行中 -> 倒计时冻结（autocore_focus_paused=1），进度见决议面板。
auto_focus_shine = {
	if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = japan_wtt_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_jap_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = german_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_ger_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = french_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_fra_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = italian_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_ita_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = british_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_eng_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = usa_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_usa_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = china_nationalist_sea_focus }
		auto_focus_complete_chi_sea_shine = yes
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { has_focus_tree = china_communist_focus_sea }
		auto_focus_complete_prc_sea_shine = yes
	}
}
